hub_page_data.target_audience: B2B marketing directors, CMOs, and founders at companies with 10-500 employees
hub_page_data.secondary_keywords: LinkedIn lead generation, B2B LinkedIn strategy, executive LinkedIn ghostwriting, LinkedIn content marketing
hub_page_data.niche_terminology: SSI (Social Selling Index), LinkedIn algorithm, dwell time, content velocity, employee advocacy, dark social
hub_page_data.unique_perspective: Most LinkedIn agencies optimise for impressions, but B2B revenue comes from profile visits converting to connection requests — companies that optimise their comment strategy (not just post frequency) generate 3× more inbound pipeline than those focused on post volume alone.
hub_page_data.data_point: LinkedIn's internal data shows that personalised connection requests accepted within 24 hours of a prospect engaging with your content have a 68% acceptance rate vs. 23% for cold outreach — making content a qualifying mechanism before direct outreach.
hub_page_data.failure_mode: Marketing teams invest in LinkedIn content without aligning it to Sales Navigator sequences, creating brand awareness that never converts to pipeline because content and outreach operate as separate silos.
hub_page_data.experience_signal: Managing LinkedIn presence for 40+ B2B clients generating $50M+ in attributed pipeline annually
hub_page_data.authority_source: LinkedIn Marketing Solutions B2B Marketing Benchmark Report 2024
